title: scutellaria altaica
intro: Scutellaria altaica, also known as the Baikal skullcap, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family and native to Russia and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria altaica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and potentially helping to prevent neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Scutellaria altaica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which allow for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
